name: Birdie and Brews
address: 2223 S Bellview Rd Suite 101, Rogers, AR 72758
about: Birdie and Brews is an interactive sports lounge in Northwest Arkansas that combines golf simulation with a taproom atmosphere. The venue features Full Swing simulators, the official licensed simulator company of the PGA TOUR, offering a realistic golf experience on iconic courses worldwide. Patrons can enjoy hourly bay rentals alongside a self-serve tap wall with locally sourced beers, seltzers, and wines. The space is designed for year-round play, supporting individual practice, group outings, corporate events, and leagues in a vibrant community setting. Beyond golf, the facility provides over 30 dynamic sports and family-fun games, including baseball, soccer, and zombie dodgeball, enhanced by a 20-foot interactive Virtual Green putting green.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing PGA TOUR simulators with tri-tracking technology for unmatched realism
Self-serve tap wall with 30+ local beer and wine options
20-foot interactive Virtual Green putting green for skill development
Over 30 dynamic sports and family-fun games beyond golf
Local community-focused atmosphere with handcrafted decor and artwork

food_and_drink.notes: Food ordering available (specific options not detailed)
Self-serve tap wall with 30+ beers, seltzers, and wines; locally sourced

simulator_hardware.notes: Official licensed PGA TOUR simulator; patented tri-tracking technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify if club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers its own kitchen and a self-serve tap wall with beer, seltzer, and wine options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not explicitly stated, but typical simulator sessions are booked by the hour, so allow at least 2-3 hours for a full round depending on group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Birdie and Brews is kid-friendly, offering over 30 family-fun games and a 20-foot interactive Virtual Green putting green suitable for all ages.
